title: Putin, Xi Jinping to attend G20 Summit in Bali: Indonesian President
description: Bali [Indonesia], August 19 (ANI): Russian President Vladimir Putin as well as his Chinese counterpart, Xi Jinping, will visit the upcoming G20 Summit in Bali, ...
